title: Work with Me
overview: Work with Me is an American situation comedy television series starring Kevin Pollack and Nancy Travis as two attorneys who are married and work together in Manhattan. The series premiered September 29, 1999, on CBS. Due to low ratings, the show was cancelled after four episodes.
creator: Stephen Engel

episodes.title: Work with Me (1999) sitcom - Nancy Travis, Emily Rutherfurd
